codeReview.summary: The rerun fix addresses the prior blocking dedupe defect: `mini/lib/home-controller.js` now prefers `digest_status: ready` rows before comparing digest/task freshness, so a newer pending placeholder no longer replaces completed digest content for the same canonical `stock_code`. The updated regression suite and Mini preview artifacts also preserve one-card-per-stock behavior and keep a waiting-state card visible when no ready digest exists.

summary: Reviewed the prior blocking report, both feature diffs (`e2d45af` and `2f244c97a27838929f27958e6be94a642452f42f`), the fix handoff/transcript skeleton, and the shared mission guidance. The fix now gives ready digests precedence over newer placeholder duplicates, retains legitimate waiting-state cards when no ready digest exists, and still renders one compact card per canonical `stock_code`, so this rerun passes with no review issues.
